title: Shakunetsu Kabaddi
synopsis: The story centers on first-year high school student Tatsuya Yoigoshi, a former ace soccer player who dislikes sports. He gets invited to join a team for the contact sport kabaddi. He scoffs at the idea at first but becomes interested after watching a kabaddi practice. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Countach
synopsis: The day after he finds himself dumped by his girlfriend, Sorayama Shun recieves a letter... from himself? The letter was from Shun 25 years ago for his future self. The letter reminds him of the time when he dreamed of owning a Countach and being a successful professional racer. With loads of luck and his ambition to make his childhood dream come true, he finds himself as a new owner of an LP400 Countach.

tags.name: Cars
tags.description: Centers around the use of automotive vehicles.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

title: Inazuma Eleven
synopsis: Raimon Middle School 's soccer club captain, Endou Mamoru is in a pinch - his club is about to be destroyed! Literally! To avert the wrecking ball and disbanding of the club, his team must win against the toughest soccer team in the area - Teikoku. Will Endou and his team meet a crushing defeat or will a mysterious transfer student with a fiery kick save them from disaster?!

tags.name: Football
tags.description: Centers around the sport of football (known in the USA as "soccer").

title: Battle Studies
synopsis: You can't win through only with "friendship" and "youth." We stake our lives to get to the Koshien!! Kanou Shoutarou entered an official baseball club at one of the best powerhouse baseball schools in the country - DL Gakuen. However the discipline in the club, he admired so much, was beyond all imagination! From Nakibokuro—the former member of PL Gakuen's baseball club who played at the Koshien as the regular!

title: Ace wo Nerae!
synopsis: A story of an ordinary high school girl who gradually discovers her hidden talent of tennis through severe trainings designed by her strict coach. Can she become an "Ace" tennis player?

title: Hyaku M.
synopsis: He was born fast. He had nothing else, only the ability to run fast. It gave him "a place at school" and "a bridge between friends." That was all the boy had. Then he met another boy who ran to forget the hardships in life. He was not fast by any means, but he had passion. The passion was infectious, and he gradually came to feel the same excitement. But that was the beginning of the "abnormality." The mad dash for that "100m"— (Source: Shonen Magazine Comics, translated) Note: Chapter count includes 2 extras.

title: Blue Ursus
synopsis: Ready to fight! Only bad girls would go to Gokumon Girls' High School. A big girl, Amaki Seina, over 180cm tall, enrolls in this rough school full of delinquents. With her extraordinary physique, she uses professional wrestling moves to defeat the delinquents one after another! What's more, she uploads clips of the fights to a video site...? What is the "personal goal" she is pursuing by picking fights with delinquents?! (Source: Manga One, translated)

title: Ring ni Kakero
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
synonyms: Put it all in the Ring

synopsis: A one-night mistake brings Yesol to the doorstep of Hanrim, a cold yet familiar face from his high school baseball team. Only now, Hanrim isn’t just cold—he’s holding a grudge. What exactly happened between them, and why can’t Yesol remember? (Source: Manta)

title: POLE STAR
synopsis: Yayano, a junior high school girl, moves to Atami from Tokyo with her mother. A somewhat rustic hotel is her mother's new workplace. Yayano is anxious about her new home, but there she witnesses a surprising sight of her mother...! For Yayano, this is a turning point! A simple pole will change a girl's life in a miraculous way! (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Tamayomi
synopsis: In her Junior High years, the pitcher Yomi Takeda was not able to get very far in a cross-school baseball tournament. Since the catcher on her team wasn't at her level, she couldn't use her signature move, the "Magic Throw," and eventually regretted not being able to use it. After Junior High, she decided to stop playing baseball and went to Shin Koshigaya High School, a school without a baseball club. There, she found her long lost childhood friend, Tamaki Yamazaki, who used to play catch ball​ with her when they were kids. Tamaki also played baseball during her Junior High years as a catcher, and could even catch Yomi's "Magic Throw!" Their promise with each other during their childhood could now be fulfilled! Walking together on the road of baseball once again... The story of the girls who love baseball will begin!

title: Chihaya Restart!
synopsis: Sakurazaka Chihaya is a girl whose only skill is her quick legs. Chihaya jumped into the world of athletics when she first met her long-time rival, Mio Koshimizu, back in junior high. She promised Mio, who went to another school, that they would meet again in the Inter-Highs.... (Source: Comic Fuz, translated)

synopsis: A soccer loving boy Takasugi Kazuya dreams of playing soccer with his Japan League star father at the National Yoyogi Stadium. The story follows Kazuya's life as he travels to Argentina, plays for Yamaki, and goes to the 1998 World Cup in France.

title: Aoku Somero
synonyms: Dye Blue, Even If You Die
synopsis: The older brother was a genius. At just 15 years old, he was already receiving offers from top teams around the world — a true “treasure of Japanese soccer.” Would it be Madrid or Barcelona? Or perhaps a prestigious club in England? The entire country was watching with anticipation to see where he would go. But the young prodigy made a surprising choice: he decided to attend “a Japanese high school where his underachieving younger brother would be enrolling.” “Because there’s someone amazing there that I want to play with!” With the “genius older brother” and the “underachieving younger brother,” let them stir up a storm in the world of soccer! (Source: Magazine pocket)

title: Sweet Heat!
synopsis: Haruzora is a popular female professional wrestler, and Eiko is a ruthless heel. The two clash fiercely in matches, but they share a secret: they are lovers and live together. This yuri comedy depicts the contrast between their passionate relationship in the ring and their sweet relationship at home. (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Bukuro Kicks
synopsis: The story is set on Tokyo. There is a rumor running around Tokyo about winning 10 million yen if you win a match to the blind soccer team "Jade Emperor Shinjuku". At that time, Ji-he, a korean girl, was looking for a member to join Brassica, a blind soccer team from Ikebukuro. One day, a blind young man called Oyamada came to the cabaret club where she works. Oyamada, who has no experience in blind soccer, is forced to join to team to match the required number of members. However, this man is actually...

title: Rice Shoulder
synopsis: The story revolves around a 202-pound, 18-year old girl named Okome Akino (whose name is a pun of "autumn rice"). After Okome enters a sumo match and wins against a male amateur fighter by a landslide, a trainer named Akane scouts her, and she enters the world of women's boxing. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume: Reburn!!
synopsis: Koyori is a new transfer student looking for excitement, and Agari is a girl who devotes herself to her sport. Their encounter will create a fiery whirlwind in the world of junior high table tennis! Will Koyori and her team be able to grab a ticket to the nationals at the Tokyo tournament? Hearts pounding! Love at full speed! The story about girls' youth, previous adapted into anime, has been rekindled! (Source: Takeshobo, translated) Note: A sequel to Shakunetsu no Takkyuu Musume , originally announced in a special chapter called Shakunetsu no Idol Musume on February 24th 2023.
